meaning: n.[鸟](产于北美的)东菲比霸蓊,月神,月亮 Phoebe 菲比(女子名)
examples: Phoebe, pregnant, has cravings for meat; Joey agrees to be a temporary vegetarian so she can eat meat without causing more animals to die.
Phoebe helps Monica try to relax.
Phoebe, to my surprise, spoke up.
Miss Banks was travelling to Ms Stanley's home with Phoebe's father when the contractions started.
"The baby is doing OK and has been named Phoebe, " a spokesman for the rail company said.
